name: CITY_SIZE
//: City sizes. Higher number means larger cities. 0 disables cities.  Min: 0, Max: 16, Default: 8

name: CITY_SPACING
//: City spacing. Higher number means cities are further apart. Min: 0, Max: 8, Default: 4

name: SPAWN_DENSITY
//: Monster scaling spawn rate factor. Higher number means more monsters. Min: 0.1, Max: 50.0, Default: 1.0

name: ITEM_SPAWNRATE
//: Item spawn scaling factor. Higher numbers means more items. Min: 0.01, Max: 10.0, Default: 1.0

name: NPC_SPAWNRATE
//: Baseline average number of days between random NPC spawns. Higher Number means fewer NPCs. 0 to disable NPCs. Min: 0.01, Max: 100.0, Default: 4.0

name: MONSTER_SPEED
//: Monster movement rate. Higher numbers increases monster speed and lower reduces it. Represented in percent, e.g. 'value: 100' means 100%. Requires world reset. Min: 1, Max: 1000, Default: 100

name: MONSTER_RESILIENCE
//: Determines how much damage monsters can take. Higher numbers increases monster resilience and lower reduces it. Represented in percent, e.g. 'value: 100' means 100%. Requires world reset. Min: 1, Max: 1000, Default: 100

name: EVOLUTION_INVERSE_MULTIPLIER
//: A multiplier for the time between monster upgrades.  For example a value of 2.00 would cause evolution to occur at half speed.  Set to 0.00 to turn off monster upgrades. Min: 0.01, Max: 100, Default: 1.0.
